title: Noise & Vibration Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to quantify the total cost of noise and vibration in manufacturing environments, based on ISO 2631, ISO 9612, Lean, and Six Sigma principles.

inputs.label: Number of workers exposed
inputs.businessContext: Total headcount in the noise/vibration zone (e.g., assembly line, press shop).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total headcount in the noise/vibration zone (e.g., assembly line, press shop).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gürültü/titreşim bölgesindeki (ör. montaj hattı, pres atölyesi) toplam personel sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtpersonalbestand in der Lärm-/Vibrationszone (z. B. Montagelinie, Presswerk).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Effectif total dans la zone de bruit/vibration (ex. chaîne de montage, atelier de presse).
businessContext_i18n.es: Plantilla total en la zona de ruido/vibración (ej., línea de montaje, taller de prensas).
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي عدد الموظفين في منطقة الضوضاء/الاهتزاز (مثل خط التجميع، ورشة الضغط).

inputs.label: Average daily exposure hours
inputs.businessContext: Per worker, typical shift duration in the affected area.

businessContext_i18n.en: Per worker, typical shift duration in the affected area.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İşçi başına, etkilenen alandaki tipik vardiya süresi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Pro Arbeiter, typische Schichtdauer im betroffenen Bereich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Par travailleur, durée typique du quart de travail dans la zone concernée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Por trabajador, duración típica del turno en el área afectada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: لكل عامل، مدة النوبة النموذجية في المنطقة المتأثرة.

inputs.label: Noise level (A-weighted)
inputs.businessContext: Measured at operator position per ISO 9612. 85 dB(A) is typical action level.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured at operator position per ISO 9612. 85 dB(A) is typical action level.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 9612'ye göre operatör pozisyonunda ölçülür. 85 dB(A) tipik eylem seviyesidir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessen am Bedienerplatz nach ISO 9612. 85 dB(A) ist typischer Auslösewert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesuré à la position de l'opérateur selon ISO 9612. 85 dB(A) est le niveau d'action typique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Medido en la posición del operador según ISO 9612. 85 dB(A) es el nivel de acción típico.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يقاس عند موضع المشغل وفقًا لـ ISO 9612. 85 ديسيبل (A) هو مستوى العمل النموذجي.

inputs.label: Vibration level (RMS acceleration)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted acceleration per ISO 2631-1. Hand-arm or whole-body.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weighted acceleration per ISO 2631-1. Hand-arm or whole-body.
businessContext_i18n.tr: ISO 2631-1'e göre ağırlıklı ivme. El-kol veya tüm vücut.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bewertete Beschleunigung nach ISO 2631-1. Hand-Arm oder Ganzkörper.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Accélération pondérée selon ISO 2631-1. Main-bras ou corps entier.
businessContext_i18n.es: Aceleración ponderada según ISO 2631-1. Mano-brazo o cuerpo completo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التسارع الموزون وفقًا لـ ISO 2631-1. يد-ذراع أو كامل الجسم.

inputs.label: Machine runtime per day
inputs.businessContext: Total operating hours of the primary noise/vibration source.

label_i18n.fr: Temps de fonctionnement de la machine par jour
label_i18n.es: Tiempo de funcionamiento de la máquina por día

businessContext_i18n.en: Total operating hours of the primary noise/vibration source.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birincil gürültü/titreşim kaynağının toplam çalışma saatleri.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Heures totales de fonctionnement de la source principale de bruit/vibration.
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas totales de funcionamiento de la fuente principal de ruido/vibración.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي ساعات تشغيل مصدر الضوضاء/الاهتزاز الرئيسي.

inputs.label: Annual maintenance cost per machine
inputs.businessContext: Current average spend on repairs and parts for each affected machine.

label_i18n.fr: Coût annuel de maintenance par machine
label_i18n.es: Costo anual de mantenimiento por máquina

businessContext_i18n.en: Current average spend on repairs and parts for each affected machine.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Etkilenen her makine için onarım ve yedek parçalara yapılan mevcut ortalama harcama.
businessContext_i18n.de: Aktuelle durchschnittliche Ausgaben für Reparaturen und Ersatzteile pro betroffener Maschine.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dépenses actuelles moyennes en réparations et pièces pour chaque machine affectée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gasto promedio actual en reparaciones y piezas para cada máquina afectada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط الإنفاق الحالي على الإصلاحات وقطع الغيار لكل ماكينة متأثرة.

inputs.label: Number of machines in zone
inputs.businessContext: Count of equipment generating noise/vibration in the assessed area.

label_i18n.fr: Nombre de machines dans la zone
label_i18n.es: Número de máquinas en la zona

businessContext_i18n.en: Count of equipment generating noise/vibration in the assessed area.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değerlendirilen alanda gürültü/titreşim üreten ekipman sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Geräte, die im bewerteten Bereich Lärm/Vibration erzeugen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'équipements générant du bruit/vibration dans la zone évaluée.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cantidad de equipos que generan ruido/vibración en el área evaluada.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد المعدات المولدة للضوضاء/الاهتزاز في المنطقة المقيمة.

inputs.label: Average worker annual salary (fully loaded)
inputs.businessContext: Includes wages, benefits, overhead. Used to estimate productivity loss.

label_i18n.fr: Salaire annuel moyen d'un travailleur (charges incluses)
label_i18n.es: Salario anual promedio del trabajador (costo total)
label_i18n.ar: متوسط الراتب السنوي للعامل (بما في ذلك التكاليف الإضافية)

businessContext_i18n.en: Includes wages, benefits, overhead. Used to estimate productivity loss.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Maaş, yan haklar, genel giderleri içerir. Verimlilik kaybını tahmin etmek için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Umfasst Löhne, Sozialleistungen, Gemeinkosten. Wird zur Schätzung von Produktivitätsverlusten verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Inclut salaires, avantages, frais généraux. Utilisé pour estimer la perte de productivité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Incluye salarios, beneficios, gastos generales. Se utiliza para estimar la pérdida de productividad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: يشمل الأجور والمزايا والتكاليف العامة. يستخدم لتقدير فقدان الإنتاجية.

rules.message: Worker exposure hours cannot exceed machine runtime hours.
Defect rate must be between 0% and 50%.
Either noise or vibration should be above typical background to justify assessment.

thresholds.alert: Noise level exceeds 85 dB(A) action level per ISO 9612. Hearing conservation program required.
Vibration level in caution zone (ISO 2631). Health surveillance recommended.
Vibration level exceeds danger threshold (ISO 2631). Immediate engineering controls required.
Defect rate above 5% indicates significant vibration impact on quality. Six Sigma DMAIC project recommended.

hiddenLossDrivers: Composite model — validate each cost leg against actuals
Physical exposure factors are normalized estimates
suggestedActions: Reconcile labor and maintenance legs separately
Benchmark noise/vibration factors with site measurement
